fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Identifier of the parent ThreadPost in a nested thread.

fields.name: threadRootId
fields.description: Identifier of the top-level thread this post belongs to.

fields.name: authorId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the post's author.

fields.name: authorName
fields.description: The name of the post's author.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The main text content of the post.

fields.name: voteCount
fields.description: The number of votes associated with this item.

fields.name: replyCount
fields.description: The number of replies to this post.
fields.synonyms: count, number of replies, child posts

fields.name: replies
fields.description: A list of child ThreadPost entities.

fields.name: focusedRow
fields.description: The currently selected or active row within the thread.

events.name: SELECT
events.description: Indicates a post or reply has been chosen for interaction.

events.name: REPLY
events.description: Indicates a new reply has been created and added to the thread.

events.name: EDIT_REPLY
events.description: Indicates a reply has been modified.

events.name: SUBMIT_REPLY
events.description: Signals a new reply has been successfully submitted.

events.name: CANCEL_REPLY
events.description: Indicates a reply creation was aborted by the user.

events.name: ThreadPostLoaded
events.description: Signals a thread post has been successfully retrieved.

events.name: ThreadPostLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a thread post.
events.synonyms: load error, fetch failed, retrieval failed

events.name: ThreadPostCreated
events.description: A new post has been added to the thread.

events.name: ThreadPostCreateFailed
events.description: Indicates a failure to create a new thread post.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Body content tree
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after thread posts load. Default is the canonical forum-style data-list. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (chat bubbles, email-threaded cards, linear comment stacks, etc.) to deliver entirely different thread UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

overridableConfigKeys.label: detailAuthorBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Detail-pane binding for the focused message author.

overridableConfigKeys.label: detailContentBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Detail-pane binding for the message body.

overridableConfigKeys.label: detailFromBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Detail-pane binding for the From address.

overridableConfigKeys.label: detailSubjectBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Detail-pane binding for the focused message subject.

overridableConfigKeys.label: detailToBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Detail-pane binding for the To address.

overridableConfigKeys.label: emailAuthorBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: List-pane binding for the message author.

overridableConfigKeys.label: emailPreviewBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: List-pane binding for the message preview text.

overridableConfigKeys.label: emailSubjectBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: List-pane binding for the message subject.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Flat thread
overridableConfigKeys.description: Render replies as a linear list instead of nested tree

overridableConfigKeys.label: replyAuthorBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Reply binding for the reply author.

overridableConfigKeys.label: replyContentBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Reply binding for the reply body.

overridableConfigKeys.label: replyDateBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Reply binding for the reply timestamp.

overridableConfigKeys.label: replyFromBinding
overridableConfigKeys.description: Reply binding for the reply From address.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Table look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the data table rendered by this atom.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Root post id
overridableConfigKeys.description: Top-level post whose descendants are loaded (blank = all roots)
